title: Lazy Sherry Loaf
description: An earthy and juicy Lazy Sunday dish featuring dry sherry, this simple recipe combines bread dough with a touch of sherry for a lazy cook's delight.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the self-rising flour and salt.
Add in the dry sherry and baking soda. Mix until well combined.
Knead the dough for about 2 minutes until it becomes smooth.
Transfer the dough to a greased loaf pan and press it down evenly.
Bake for approximately 30-35 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Let the loaf cool in the pan for another 10 minutes before transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
